title: fix: add step-3.5-flash to text backend available models
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Step into the Flash
gist.blurb: We squashed a pesky 404 bug that was hiding the step-3.5-flash model. It's now fully wired up and ready for your text generation needs!
gist.summary: Fixed a configuration issue in the text backend that caused requests for the step-3.5-flash model to return a 404 error.
gist.impact: Developers can now successfully route chat completion requests to step-3.5-flash and its aliases.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing a missing model connection (step-3.5-flash) in the text backend. Visuals: The bee mascot plugging in a glowing cable or finding a missing glowing 'flash' drive/cartridge. Nomnom creature happily eating the 404 error logs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot plugging a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cartridge labeled 'FLASH' into a retro server rack. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a piece of paper that says '404'. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
